Off Calendar Oct-06-2009 Continued To Nov-23-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT KEVIN HIRSCH Motion for Order setting aside Default entered on July 21, 2009. Appearances: F. Shaun Burns, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Neil J. Rosenbaum, of Rosenbaum & Assoc.(619) 990-7030 appearing for Defendant and moving party. (The Court considers plaintiff's opposition at the hearing.) Hearing held. Argued and the Court rules that the Motion setting aside default is granted. Defense counsel to prepare Order. Plaintiff's counsel motion for attorney's fees and costs, pursuant to CCP section 473 is continued to 11/23/09 for hearing. Request to be filed by 11/2/09; opposition to be filed by 11/13/09; reply to be filed by 11/19/09. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR #12353
